chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Takbir on the Night and Day of Eid Al-Fitr and What is Said in the Prostration of Gratitude After Maghrib

text: هِ وَ رَزَقَنَا مِنْ بَهِيمَةِ اَلْأَنْعَامِ فَإِنَّ ذَلِكَ فِي أَيَّامِ اَلتَّشْرِيقِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2035 - It is narrated:
"It is not said in it (the Takbir for Eid al-Fitr), 'and He provided us with the livestock of cattle,' as that phrase pertains to the days of Tashreeq (the days following Eid al-Adha)."
